title: Globot
tagline: Multi-Agents. 2M-token compliance analysis. Satellite imagery risk detection. Globot turns sudden supply chain chaos into confident decisions in 60 seconds.

title: Aegis: Autonomous Multi-Agent Crisis Command
tagline: An autonomous multi-agent command center that prevents 911 collapse by triaging thousands of distress signals instantly using Google Gemini 3.

title: Netra: Empowering the Visually Impaired
tagline: Restoring independence through AI. Netra provides the visually impaired with a high-speed vision system that reads text, recognizes faces, and describes surroundings in real-time.

title: Proofy.AI
tagline: An explainable, Gemini-powered verification platform built to restore trust in digital media.

title: Agent-weaver
tagline: Turn Gemini into a coordinated team of 5 specialized AI agents with shared memory, human-verified annotations, and real-time collaboration between teams and their agents.

title: Orphafold
tagline: OrphaFold orchestrates specialized Gemini 3 agents to bridge Orphanet, UniProt, Pubmed and AlphaFold data. Our AI Agents automates rare disease research to discover hidden therapeutic connections.

title: Orbital Assets
tagline: The first Investment Bank for the solar system. Orbital Assets, powered by Gemini 3 Reasoning, turns raw NASA asteroid data into rigorous, physics-based financial valuations.

title: Logic Lift
tagline: Logic Lift uses Gemini 3 to perform 'Logic Archaeology'—autonomously recovering critical financial business logic from legacy COBOL and verifying it into cloud-native Python with 100% parity.

title: AgentGuard: The Semantic Firewall for the Agentic Web
tagline: The SSL for AI Agents. A Semantic Firewall that uses Gemini 3.0 to distinguish helpful shoppers from malicious scrapers in real-time.

title: PROCSee
tagline: PROCSee turns your system into a crime scene — and autonomously investigates every process

title: BatteryForgeAI
tagline: Multi-agent battery intelligence. Specialized AI for vision-based defect detection, charging optimization, and fleet safety to maximize battery lifecycle and performance.

title: Gemini GeoFlow
tagline: Fusing Text and Terrain: An LLM-Powered Pipeline for Preparing Archaeological Datasets

title: CineStream: A2A Mesh & Cinematic Learning
tagline: A2A Intelligence Mesh & Academy: Eliminating 'Knowledge Friction' via strategic executive synthesis and high-fidelity cinematic pedagogy for all.
